rulings.Case Title: WALTER YEE et al VS. THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 13, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AMENDED DEMURRER to amended complaint Sustained with final leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in good faith in concise and clear manner a viable cause of action against the City based on the enforceable "promise" and/or enforceable "contract" that is not barred as delineated by the Defendant in the moving and reply papers. The amended complaint shall not include causes of action previously stricken by anti-SLAPP. The amended complaint shall only include the causes of action 1-4 and 7 if Plaintiff can allege in good faith facts addressing all the issues raised by Defendant's demurrer, including but not limited to the statute of limitations, Government Claims Act, exhaustion of administrative remedies, statute of frauds, etc. All the amendments to the complaint shall be in bold (for additions) or crossed-out (for the deletions). The Court notes that Plaintiff's opposition is again devoid of any legal authority.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 13, 2017 line 2. PLAINTIFFs FERNANDO BUENO, ARACELI ESPINOZA, AMINTA CALDERON, and ABDON CALDERON's Motion To Exclude Defendants Hawk Ling Lou, Individually, Hawk Ling Lou And Ketty Fong Lou, As Trustees Of The Hawk Ling Lou And Ketty Fong Lou Revocable Trust Dated January 27, 1998, Hawk Ling Lou Dba Mission Market Management, Erroneously Sued As Ken Yee, Dba Mission Market Management'S Supplemental Expert Witnesses OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NIMER A. MASSIS VS. BRANDY SUMMERS RODRIGUEZ ET AL

PLAINTIFF NIMER MASSIS's Motion To File Second Amended Complaint Due To Excusable Neglect And Or In The Alternative Based On Attorney Neglect And Mandatory Relief GRANTED. No opposition field. rulings.Case Title: CHRIS NORRIS ET AL VS. CALIBER HOME LOANS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 13, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANT CALIBER HOME LOANS, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer. Plaintiff shall have 10 days from notice of entry of order to file an amended complaint. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TENTH AND MARKET LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY VS. DAWN PATRICK ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 13, 2017 line 6. PLAINTIFF TENTH AND MARKET LLC'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT GRANTED. Plaintiff presents evidence of breach of the stipulation. Defendant fails to present any evidence to the contrary. October 7, 2016 became null and void upon Defendant's compliance with the conditions stated in October 7, 2016 order. Plaintiff to prepare order and judgment.= (501/REQ)
